definition:
1. of persons, easily satisfied, contented with one's food , [variant datesAnthology Palantina, (Plutarch) 
2. easily satisfied, contented, good-natured, peaceable , Lat. facilis, comis, (Aristophanes Comicus); with dative, εὔκολος πολίταις friendly  to them, at peace with  them, (Aristophanes Comicus):—;adverb -λως, tranquilly, calmly , (Plato Philosophus) 
3. willing, agile , [variant datesAnthology Palantina 
4. in bad sense, easily led, prone , πρὸς ἀδικίαν (Lucian) 
5. of things, easy , (Plato Philosophus) (ML)
